## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Gendo and GrowthX for content marketing and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gendo is a seed-stage AI company developing a platform for architects/designers, focusing on image production](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and marketing strategies, with a focus on organic growth through high-quality, programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Potential engagement to start in June, after Gendo's new growth marketer joins (May 27th)](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide SOW for tutorial-focused engagement, with Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)

## Topics

### Gendo's Current State and Needs

  - [8-person team, growing to 12-13 soon](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Targeting small to medium-sized architecture firms (avg. 7 people)](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Product-led growth (PLG) strategy with self-serve subscription model](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Minimal marketing efforts so far, but seeing organic traction](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Hiring a growth marketer (starting May 27th)](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Planning website restructure and content expansion](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [AI-powered content creation with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [12-week initial engagement to develop content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Creation of "Content OS" with topical clusters and keyword assignments](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Blend of AI automation and human-led content creation](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Flexible image creation options (AI-generated, templatized, stock photos)](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Publishing support through various CMS platforms](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)

### Engagement Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send SOW for tutorial-focused engagement](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Aim to start engagement in June, after new growth marketer joins](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Potential call with Joe (new growth marketer) after his start date](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to send SOW for tutorial-focused engagement to George](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for communication between Gendo and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [George to review SOW and discuss internally](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call in late May/early June with Joe (new growth marketer) involved](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Decide on engagement start date (likely mid-June)](https://fathom.video/share/TcyhEXywEDCMQgG7J9rxEXwUS3nMQr6N?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
